rules.name: FailedLogin
rules.description: Detects failed login attempts which may indicate brute-force attacks

rules.name: SQLInjection
rules.description: Detects common SQL injection payloads in log entries

rules.name: XSS
rules.description: Detects cross-site scripting payloads in request logs

rules.name: SuspiciousIP
rules.description: Flags accesses originating from private/internal IP ranges

rules.name: RootAccess
rules.description: Detects attempts to access root or escalate privileges

rules.name: PathTraversal
rules.description: Detects directory traversal attempts using ../ sequences
